name: air-drow
description: AIR-DROW v5.0.9: official HandLandmarker integrity sync, cache-busted local runtime, and deploy-safe output validation.

scripts.build: npm run model:sync && npm run verify:source && npm run build:static && npm run verify:deploy-output
scripts.verify:source: npm run icons:sync && npm run icons:verify && npm run updates:verify && npm run preflight && npm run completion:verify && npm run clean:verify && npm run visual:verify && npm run ui:verify && npm run check && npm run shape:verify && npm run workspace:verify && npm run loading:verify && npm run performance:verify && npm run calibration:verify && npm run hand:verify && npm run export:verify && npm run polish:verify && npm run final:verify && npm run model:verify && npm run boot:verify && npm run drawer:verify && npm run verify:release && npm run hand-source:verify
scripts.verify:deploy-output: npm run hand-loader:verify && npm run deploy-build:verify
